summary: Phase D: Pipeline & Journey Pages - ALL TESTS PASSED. Frontend-only feature testing completed successfully. Pipeline page shows Kanban board with 5 columns, 9 schools (10 after add test). Journey page shows school timeline with interactions, signals bar, coaches sidebar.
critical_code_review_comments: PipelinePage.js: Kanban board with 5 columns (overdue, needs_outreach, waiting_on_reply, in_conversation, archived) renders correctly
PipelinePage.js: Board/List view toggle works - List view shows table with School, Status, Coach, Activity, Priority columns
PipelinePage.js: Add School modal has name, division, priority, conference, notes fields
PipelinePage.js: Log Interaction modal has type (7 options) and notes fields
PipelinePage.js: Mark Replied modal appears for cards with outreach but no coach reply
PipelinePage.js: Program cards show school name, division, conference, priority badge, coach name, Log/View buttons
PipelinePage.js: Summary chips show counts per column
JourneyPage.js: School header shows name, division, conference, board_group badge
JourneyPage.js: Signals bar shows interactions count, outreach count, coach reply status, days since activity
JourneyPage.js: Timeline shows interactions with icons, dates, notes, outcome badges
JourneyPage.js: Coaching Staff, Notes, Details sidebar panels render correctly
JourneyPage.js: Inline Log Interaction form works - adds to timeline on submit
JourneyPage.js: Back to Pipeline navigation works
seed_data_creation: Added TEST University (D2, Low priority) during testing. Logged Phone Call interaction on University of Florida.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase D (Pipeline & Journey) fully verified. Routes: /pipeline (Kanban board), /pipeline/:programId (Journey/timeline). Emma has 10 schools: Stanford (overdue), Tampa/Emory/BYU/Cal Lutheran/Creighton/Ohio State/TEST University (needs_outreach), UCLA (waiting_on_reply), Florida (in_conversation). API endpoints used: GET /api/athlete/programs?grouped=true, GET /api/athlete/programs/:programId, POST /api/athlete/programs, POST /api/athlete/interactions, POST /api/athlete/programs/:programId/mark-replied.
